items.title: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.summary: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.

items.title: A Sherpa Survived 6 Days Alone on Everest. His Family Says He Was Abandoned.
items.summary: Dawa Sherpa, 57, was found alive on Thursday, nearly a week after he was last seen on the mountain. His wife says more could have been done to find him sooner.
